title: Mason Cash Cane Mixing Bowl Size 30 | Iconic 21cm Earthenware Bowl | 1.1 Litre Capacity | Dishwasher Safe | Classic British Design
features: ICONIC MIXING BOWL | The Mason Cash Cane Mixing Bowl is a British kitchen classic. This Size 30 bowl measures Dia 21cm x H10cm with a 1.1-litre capacity. Perfect for small recipes, sauces, or prepping ingredients. Ideal for baking with children.

FUNCTIONAL DESIGN | Features the distinct Mason Cash patterned exterior and wide rim for enhanced grip and control while mixing or tipping. Compact and easy to store, it’s great for everyday kitchen tasks.
DURABLE & PRACTICAL | Made from high-quality earthenware with a high-gloss glaze. Lightweight yet sturdy. Dishwasher safe for convenience and versatility.

CANE COLLECTION | The Mason Cash Original Cane range includes mixing bowls in a variety of sizes and colours, along with coordinating pudding basins and prepware designed to suit all bakers and kitchens.

MASON CASH HERITAGE | Founded in 1800, Mason Cash has been at the heart of British kitchens for generations. Known for timeless, functional design, the Cane Mixing Bowl remains a symbol of quality and heritage.
